title: Fix Console execute_tactus account context and structured errors
description:
# Fix Console execute_tactus account context and structured errors

As a Console chat agent, I want execute_tactus calls to inherit the triggering chat message account and return structured failures, so that I can run Plexus APIs from Lambda and iteratively recover from errors.

Feature: Console execute_tactus account and error handling

Scenario: Console feedback alignment uses the chat account
Given a Console chat message has accountId acct-console
When the assistant calls execute_tactus with plexus.feedback.alignment for a scorecard and score
Then the Plexus runtime resolves account operations using acct-console
And it does not issue a GraphQL account-key lookup with key null

Scenario: Missing account context is actionable
Given execute_tactus runs a feedback API without an explicit account context
When the runtime cannot resolve an account
Then the tool response has ok false
And error.code is account_context_required
And error.message explains that Console account context or an explicit account is required

Scenario: Runtime exceptions remain visible
Given a direct Plexus runtime handler raises a Python exception
When execute_tactus catches the failure
Then the caller receives ok false
And error.message includes the original exception message
And the response is not a blank Sandbox error.

Definition of Done:
- Console embedded execute_tactus passes experiment_context account_id into the Tactus runtime.
- feedback.alignment and feedback.find prefer explicit runtime account context and fail clearly without it.
- Python handler failures are converted into structured execute_tactus envelopes.
- Lambda trace persistence uses a writable/default-safe path and cannot mask tool output.
- Focused unit and console runtime tests pass.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Started on clean branch codex/console-execute-tactus-account-errors from origin/develop. Scope is account context propagation into embedded execute_tactus, actionable feedback account errors, structured direct-handler exception envelopes, and Lambda-safe trace writes.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented account-context propagation into embedded execute_tactus, explicit account resolution for feedback alignment/find, structured runtime error envelopes for Lua-hosted direct handler failures, and Lambda /tmp trace default. Focused tests are green: execute_tactus suite 121 passed; MCP transport/console/procedure compatibility 75 passed; git diff --check passed.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Opened PR into develop: https://github.com/AnthusAI/Plexus/pull/311. Branch pushed: codex/console-execute-tactus-account-errors at commit 704614c7.
